title: Heard She Got Murdered
overview: After the terrifying events of HEARD SHE GOT MARRIED, the extremely talented musician Mitch Owens (Matt Farley) is ready to move on with his life, but before he can achieve the success he deserves, fate intervenes! Now, Mitch must face horrifying secrets from his past, death around every corner, and an officer of the law who will not rest until bloody justice is served.
